text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah! ...Damn it! Damn it all straight to hell!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So that's the dream that's gonna kick off the new year, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, not much I can do about it. Guess I'll collate
some data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Two minutes and two seconds flat, two minutes
and 1.3 seconds, two minutes and 0.7 seconds...
That's enough data for firm surface conditions.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need a little more data on soft and good
surfaces. I'll need to put in a request to use the
sprinklers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Am I gonna make it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I need a walk.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
...Three, two, one!
Happy New Yeaaar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy preparing for Shakur's classic
year, the new year crept up on me before I
realized it.
choice_data_list: (A stroll might be nice for a change of pace.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I leave the academy for a
midnight stroll... only to spot the shadowy outline
of a student also trying to leave. And not just any
student...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy has a curfew, and any student
caught breaking it will be in deep trouble. No
excuse will hold water if she leaves the academy.
choice_data_list: Where were you heading off to?
Where were you heading off to?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just going for a walk.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know. And?
choice_data_list: I didn't take you for a rule breaker.
I didn't take you for a rule breaker.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I just weigh the pros and cons.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not like anyone is watchin' right now. If you
just look the other way, everything's settled.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, I've wasted enough time talking to you. Go
away already.
choice_data_list: (Well, she seems more irritable than usual...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her classic year finally upon us, it's possible
she's feeling a bit tense.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Did you hear what I said? You're bothering me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curfew is in place to protect the students. As
much as I don't want to restrict Air Shakur, I can't
look the other way on this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to delay her until she gets her feelings
under control. If I'm going to get her to agree, I
need to show her its in her best interest.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
What kinda deal?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No deal then. There's nothin' I want from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Negotiations over. Later.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna make a deal, then bring something
to the table.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, there's no point in me pullin' up a
chair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's absolutely right. What do I have to offer
that might make for a good deal?
choice_data_list: What if I let you use my office?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur seems to want to go somewhere quiet
right now. Not only is my office free at this hour,
there's hardly anyone on campus outside of the
dorms.
choice_data_list:
We could both rest easier if you stayed on
campus.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What about the security guards?
choice_data_list: I'll let them know you're coming.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And you're gonna stay outta my way, right?
You're not plannin' on monitoring me or anything
like that, are you?
choice_data_list: You'll have the place to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well... as long as you really won't be there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to monitor her. All the same, I do
need to keep an eye on her, just in case anything
happens. I'll give her space, but stay just close
enough to ensure she's safe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Figures. Sleepin' on the job.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is gone when I wake up the next
morning, and the jacket I'd left in my office is
draped over me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be because I'm too tired from working
late, but I'm at a complete loss as to what to do.
The only thing I can manage to say is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, is that all you can say?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait. You look like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur stares at me long and hard. After some
time...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'm gonna hit the sack.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You should hurry back and get some sleep too.
Also...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Working longer doesn't mean you're working
harder. If things aren't getting done, you need to
reevaluate either your workload or your methods.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The second you convince yourself you're doin'
your best, it's over. Stop before you hit that wall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to have seen right through me. I
agree to get some sleep as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Someone's full of energy today.
choice_data_list: I had a great night's sleep, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you embarrassed thanking me for
somethin' like that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Meh, whatever. Let's hurry up and train. Time
waits for no one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'll need to think this through carefully.
Air Shakur is someone who finds the absence of
data as informative as data itself. In which case...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're okay with that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You realize that whatever happens is your
responsibility now that you've seen me, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Okay, if you say so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hold back the urge to stop her, and watch as Air
Shakur walks away from me. Just five more
steps... Four, three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: All right, spit it out. What are you scheming?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've been duped, huh? You weren't actually
scheming anything, I bet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Whatever. I'm not in the mood anymore, so
I'm headin' back.
choice_data_list:
Oh! You know, if you're looking to take your
mind off things...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bought a bunch of new snacks from a local
convenience store to help get me through my
overtime. I give them all to her, in case there's
anything she likes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't need all this cra—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Does that one come with a toy from LF? I
didn't realize that game was so popular.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wow. I'm impressed with the level of detail.
Maybe I could put it on my desk?
